goal: @Rubricodex 우리 서비스에 POST /api/widgets endpoint를 추가해줘. 너무 무겁게 말고 기본 테스트까지.
mode_reason: Endpoint behavior and tests are needed, but this fixture has no auth, payment, migration, or data-integrity blast radius.
target_summary: POST /api/widgets accepts valid widget input, creates a widget, and returns 201 with a stable response body.
